scope: close out two pending omega-hexa items as bundle (per user '묶음 결정')

R5.4_hexa_remote_psi_reject.commit_msg_excerpt: scripts/bin/hexa_remote: PSI avg10 > 80 hard-reject (R5.4 ω-hexa-5) with HEXA_REMOTE_NO_PSI_REJECT=1 bypass — saturated host stalls prevention
R5.4_hexa_remote_psi_reject.action_taken_this_session: verified commit + cross-checked PSI logic still in file lines 112-121

audit_finding_recap.interpreter_state: self/runtime.c:21-25 has setvbuf(stdout, _IOLBF) — interpreter side already correct
audit_finding_recap.transport_hypothesis: ssh without -t → remote stdout pipe-buffered, may lose partial-line buffers on connection close
audit_finding_recap.audit_session_decision: R2.2 patch axis remains LOW priority since (a) interpreter is correct, (b) transport-layer fix has medium UX risk, (c) file-based evidence pattern works

decision_inputs_this_session.live_test: ssh -T hetzner 'echo line1; echo line2' → both lines printed, rc=0 (multi-line stdout works under current -T)
decision_inputs_this_session.no_active_incidents: git log --since 2026-04-25 --grep stdout|buffer|silent → 0 matches in nexus (no recent commit references stdout suppression)
decision_inputs_this_session.current_T_intentional: scripts/bin/hexa_remote line 1181 comment: '-T = no pty, ServerAlive = 장시간 compute (drill) 중 네트워크 끊기면 30s 내 감지 후 종료' — deliberate choice for compute-drill workflow
decision_inputs_this_session.HEXA_REMOTE_PTY_env: not present anywhere in codebase — proposed gate is unimplemented

deferred_reasons: no reproducible stdout-suppression incident currently observable
PTY mode merges stderr→stdout, alters line endings (LF→CRLF), affects programs that detect TTY (color codes, prompts) — UX regression risk concrete
current `ssh -T` behavior verified working for multi-line output in live test
R2.2 audit-session itself recommended LOW priority + skip
file-based evidence convention (println-to-file via exec heredoc) is established workaround, sufficient for ω-audio empirical and other current pipelines
applying any R2.2 variant would require additional rebuild cycle (R2.2a needs full hexa rebuild; R2.2b/c need transport-layer behavior change with broad downstream effect)
reconsider_triggers: concrete stdout-suppression incident reproducible from a hexa script run via hexa_remote (with expected vs actual line listing)
file-based evidence pattern proves insufficient for a new pipeline (e.g., real-time streaming output to user terminal)
drill workflow itself migrates off ssh-T (then PTY adoption becomes neutral)

rejected_alternatives_in_audit.R2.2a: interpreter add fflush(stdout) — paranoid, requires full hexa rebuild for unproven gain
rejected_alternatives_in_audit.R2.2c: docker exec -t — smaller scope but resolver was just patched (R3.2); avoid back-to-back resolver edits
rejected_alternatives_in_audit.R2.2d: stdbuf -o0 prefix — GNU coreutils availability in container unverified

actions_taken: documented R2.2b deferral with reconsider triggers
